name: Explore seed corpus — external scenes
description: Public Gaussian-Splat scenes hosted on third-party CDNs that we index in the SplatForge Explore registry but do NOT mirror locally. Each entry links out to the upstream source; KHR-conformance is reported as 'unknown' (untested) or 'fail-expected' (we have not optimized these through SplatForge, so they almost certainly fail the KHR-spz subset our writer enforces — which is the selling point of the optimizer).
honestyNote: Brief asked for 78 seed entries (DL3DV-50, KIRI-10, Polycam-14, Mip-NeRF-4). Reality: DL3DV is gated CC-BY-NC (commercial-use-prohibited, not 'public-licensed' for a public registry); KIRI Engine and Polycam public showcases do not expose stable raw splat asset URLs (their viewers stream encrypted/proprietary chunks). We are shipping the scenes we can actually verify are publicly downloadable under a permissive research license: 7 additional Mip-NeRF 360 / Deep Blending scenes from the canonical dylanebert/3dgs Hugging Face dataset. The total registry size becomes 16 (splatbench) + 7 (external) = 23 entries. See README for the gap.

scenes.attribution: Barron et al. (Mip-NeRF 360, CVPR 2022); 3DGS training by dylanebert (HuggingFace).
scenes.notes: Iteration 7k, unoptimized .splat. Run through SplatForge to get a KHR-compliant glb.
